properties.label: Roll back records when errors occur?
properties.hint: When Yes, the batch is rolled back when the upsert of an object fails. If the batch is larger than 200 records, only the affected batch is rolled back. The default, No, is recommended.

toggle_field.label: Roll back records when errors occur?
toggle_field.hint: When Yes, the batch is rolled back when the upsert of an object fails. If the batch is larger than 200 records, only the affected batch is rolled back. The default, No, is recommended.
toggle_field.name: allOrNone
